category_sources: Official homepage https://fmpp.sourceforge.net/ describes FMPP as a general-purpose text file preprocessing tool for generating static sites, source code, and configuration files.
source_facts.description says FMPP is a text file preprocessing tool using FreeMarker templates.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is “FMPP - FreeMarker-based file PreProcessor” at https://fmpp.sourceforge.net/.
docs_sources: Official homepage documentation section links to the FMPP Manual and Java API on fmpp.sourceforge.net.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links to GitHub, and that repository is https://github.com/freemarker/fmpp.
tags_sources: Official homepage states FMPP can be used from a UNIX-style command-line interface and was written in Java.
